title: Subset Sum equal to K
hints: Use backtracking to explore all possible subsets.
For each element, you have two choices: include it in the subset or exclude it.
Keep track of the current sum as you build the subset.
If current sum equals B, return 1 (found a valid subset).
If you've processed all elements and sum doesn't match, return 0.
Recursively explore both choices: including and excluding each element.
